name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash Leon Valley, Texas — Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, lines of credit to $4,000, and title loans up to $4,000 with in-store appli...
description_long:
Speedy Cash is a brick-and-mortar consumer finance company operating multiple locations across Memphis, Tennessee and other states. The company specializes in short-term lending products designed for consumers facing immediate financial needs, with a physical storefront model that emphasizes in-person customer service and face-to-face loan consultations. The Memphis Summer Avenue location operates during extended hours (9am-7pm most weekdays, closed Sundays) to accommodate working customers.

Speedy Cash offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans up to $425 with repayment due around the next paycheck; Lines of Credit up to $4,000 with flexible draw and repayment options; and Title Loans up to $4,000 secured by vehicle collateral. The company also provides ancillary money services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and Green Dot Visa debit card issuance. All loan products require applicants to provide valid government ID, proof of employment/income, working phone number, email address, and proof of address. Title loans additionally require vehicle appraisal and proof of insurance.

Speedy Cash distinguishes itself through its store-based model where customers can ask questions during the application process, have loans reviewed by staff before signing, and receive immediate answers about funding and repayment terms. The company emphasizes transparency by allowing borrowers to know exact borrowing costs before signing agreements. The availability of online application initiation combined with in-store completion provides a hybrid approach. Multiple Memphis locations (8+ stores listed) and extended operating hours on weekdays accommodate various customer schedules.

However, as a payday and title lending company, Speedy Cash's products carry inherent limitations typical of emergency cash lending: payday loans have short repayment windows creating debt cycle risk, title loans require vehicle collateral (risking loss of transportation), and no APR or fee information is disclosed on the website despite regulatory requirements. The maximum payday loan amount of $425 is relatively modest. The company operates in a heavily regulated industry with state-specific restrictions (note about Alabama title pawns and clear title requirements in certain states), suggesting varying product availability by location. No information about alternative credit products or credit-building assistance is mentioned.
address: 7007 Bandera Rd Ste 24, Leon Valley, TX 78238

company_info.headquarters: 7007 Bandera Rd Ste 24, Leon Valley, TX 78238

pros: Multiple loan amounts available: payday loans ($425), lines of credit ($4,000), and title loans ($4,000) for different needs
Extended weekday hours (9am-7pm Monday and Friday) accommodate working customers unable to visit during standard business hours
In-store application process allows customers to ask questions and understand exact borrowing costs before signing
Hybrid application option: start online and complete in-store, or apply entirely in-store with staff assistance
Lines of Credit offer flexibility to draw as-needed up to approved limit with repayment spreading principal plus interest over time
Title loan appraisal conducted on-site during application, eliminating separate appraisal appointments
Additional money services (check cashing, wire transfers, money orders) available at same locations for convenience
cons: Payday loan maximum of $425 is insufficient for many emergency situations, requiring customers to seek multiple loans or alternate products
Title loans require vehicle collateral, creating risk of losing primary transportation if unable to repay
No APR, interest rates, or fee schedule disclosed on website despite regulatory requirements for disclosure
Short repayment window on payday loans (due at next paycheck) creates high risk of debt cycling and repeat borrowing
Closed Sundays and limited Saturday hours (9am-4pm only) restrict access for some customers with inflexible schedules
best_for: Employed individuals facing unexpected expenses before next paycheck with access to stable income for quick repayment
Vehicle owners needing larger emergency loans ($4,000+) who are willing to use auto title as collateral
Customers preferring in-person financial service interactions and wanting to discuss loan terms with live staff before committing
Memphis-area residents needing check cashing or money transfer services combined with short-term lending options
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best suited for employed individuals with stable income seeking small emergency cash loans ($425-$4,000) within 1-2 pay periods, who value in-person service and don't qualify for traditional bank lending. The primary caveat is that payday and title lending carries significant debt-cycling risk and undisclosed interest rates—these products should be genuinely last-resort options, not regular borrowing solutions.
services: Title loans up to $4,000 (secured by vehicle)
Green Dot Visa debit card issuance
Vehicle appraisal for title loan qualification
